aiscan-analyzing-browser-ai: Analyzing with Browser AI (this may take a moment)...
aiscan-browser-prompt-not-available: Browser Prompt API is not available in this browser.
aiscan-create-new-supplier-confirm: Supplier not found. Do you want AiScan to create a new supplier with the extracted data?
aiscan-currency-must-be-a-3-letter-iso-c: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO code.
aiscan-default-product-help: Search and select the product to use by default.
aiscan-doc-discarded: This document has been discarded and will not be imported.
aiscan-document-and-image-drop: Drop PDF or image files here
aiscan-due-date-must-use-yyyy-mm-dd-form: Due date must use YYYY-MM-DD format.
aiscan-duplicate-in-batch: This invoice was already analyzed in this batch (same as %name%).
aiscan-duplicate-invoice-exists: A purchase invoice with this number already exists: %code%. Review before importing.
aiscan-file-too-large: File too large. Maximum size: %size% MB.
aiscan-file-uploaded-select-provider: File uploaded. Select a provider and click Analyze.
aiscan-image-text-extraction-requires-pr: [Image file - text extraction requires an AI provider]
aiscan-import-mode-required: You must select an import mode.
aiscan-initial-review-message: Upload documents and analyze them to review supplier, invoice, and line data.
aiscan-issue-date-must-use-yyyy-mm-dd-fo: Issue date must use YYYY-MM-DD format.
aiscan-manual-entry-help: Upload the document and fill in the data by hand without calling the AI. Useful when no API key is set or you prefer not to scan.
aiscan-missing-supplier-tax-id: Supplier tax ID (CIF/NIF) was not detected. Review it before importing.
aiscan-mock-mode-help: With debug mode enabled you can use the mock provider: it returns JSON from Test/fixtures/responses/ without calling any AI. Ideal to validate the UI and supplier product suggestions.
aiscan-mode-lines-help: Imports each invoice item as a separate line.
aiscan-mode-total-help: Imports the invoice from its totals, creating one line per tax rate.
aiscan-multi-invoice-detected: %count% invoices detected in this document. Each one has been added to the review list.
aiscan-no-providers: No AI providers configured. Go to AiScan settings.
aiscan-party-type-help: Choose whether the party is booked as a supplier (goods) or creditor (services). This drives the accounting subaccount (PROVEE / ACREED).
aiscan-purchase-data-line-skipped-invali: Line %line%: purchase data was not updated because the net unit cost is invalid.
aiscan-purchase-data-line-update-failed: Line %line%: the product purchase data could not be updated.
aiscan-queued-for-analysis: This invoice is queued and waiting to be analyzed.
aiscan-response-truncated: The AI response was truncated. Some lines may be missing. Try re-analyzing by totals.
aiscan-scan-failed-invalid-response: The AI response is invalid or incomplete. You can enter the data manually.
aiscan-scan-failed-manual-entry: Automatic scan is unavailable. You can enter the invoice data manually.
aiscan-scan-failed-network: Could not connect to the AI provider. You can enter the data manually.
aiscan-scan-failed-no-provider: No AI provider is configured (missing API key). You can enter the data manually.
aiscan-scan-failed-provider-error: The AI provider returned an error (quota, HTTP, etc.). You can enter the data manually.
aiscan-stock-line-skipped-invalid-quanti: Line %line%: stock was not updated because the original quantity is invalid.
aiscan-stock-line-skipped-no-product: Line %line%: stock was not updated because no product is linked.
aiscan-stock-line-skipped-not-controlled: Line %line%: the product does not track stock, so no stock movement was created.
aiscan-stock-line-update-failed: Line %line%: the product stock could not be updated.
aiscan-supplier-ambiguous: Multiple supplier matches found. Select the correct supplier.
aiscan-supplier-created-on-save: A new supplier will be created when you save the invoice.
aiscan-supplier-not-found-on-save: No supplier match found. You can create one during save.
aiscan-supplier-not-matched-or-created: Supplier could not be matched or created.
aiscan-tax-mismatch: Tax mismatch: subtotal(%subtotal%) + tax(%tax%) - withholding(%withholding%) = %computed% but total is %declared%.
aiscan-total-mismatch: Calculated total (%calculated%) does not match invoice total (%invoice%). Review the line items.
aiscan-undecided-remaining: %count% invoice(s) still need a review decision
aiscan-update-stock-purchase-data: Update stock and purchase data from invoice lines
aiscan-update-stock-purchase-data-help: If the product already exists, add stock when applicable and only update supplier/purchase prices with valid data.
aiscan-use-cloud-provider-for-image: Browser AI cannot analyze images. Please select a cloud provider (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.).
aiscan-use-cloud-provider-for-pdf: Could not extract text from this PDF. Please select a cloud provider for analysis.
aiscan-use-history-help: Enrich AI analysis with patterns from previous invoices of the same supplier.
browser-prompt-enabled: Enable experimental Browser Prompt API provider
name: Name
